frame_analyses.description: Both needle drivers visible, preparing to load needle. Red foam block and suture material visible in field.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial setup appears appropriate with instruments positioned

frame_analyses.description: Right needle driver grasping needle, left providing counter-traction on suture
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good bimanual coordination during needle loading phase

frame_analyses.description: Needle being positioned for entry through drain material, suture tail visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle appears properly loaded in right driver

frame_analyses.description: Needle passing through drain material, creating suture loop
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Entry point appears close to target area

frame_analyses.description: Beginning knot tying sequence, both instrument tips working on suture manipulation
Double throw formation visible as suture is wrapped around instrument
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Surgeon's knot double throw being created

frame_analyses.description: Second throw being formed with hand switch, left instrument now leading
Final throw completion with right hand leading again
Both suture tails being cut with scissors inside the trainer

penalties.description: Estimated 1-2mm deviation from ideal mark placement

knot_assessments.notes: Good hand switch and throw formation
Final throw completed with proper hand alternation

confidence_rationale: Camera angle makes precise measurement of suture placement deviation difficult. Knot formation and hand switching clearly visible. Overall task completion well-documented.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation at entry and exit points due to camera angle
Precise measurement of mark locations relative to suture placement
technique_summary: Strong expert-level performance with excellent time management and proper technique. All required elements executed correctly including surgeon's knot, alternating hands, and intracorporeal suture cutting.
strengths: Efficient knot tying with proper surgeon's knot formation
Excellent overall time management at 96 seconds
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise suture placement relative to marks
Consider slightly slower approach to suture placement for improved accuracy
